
```{python}
import statsmodels.api as sm
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

df = pd.read_csv("../data/model_df.csv")
```

```{python}
print(df["outcome"].value_counts().sort_index())
print(pd.crosstab(
    [df["powerplay"], df["end_grp"], df["score_diff_grp"]],
    df["outcome"]
))
```
```{python}


df = df.dropna(
    subset=[
        
        "h_offensive_shots",
        "h_classified_shots",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

df["h_defensive_shots"] = (
    df["h_classified_shots"] - df["h_offensive_shots"]
)

style_glm = smf.glm(
    """
    h_offensive_shots + h_defensive_shots ~ powerplay
                                           + C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                                           + C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                                           + powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                                           
                                           + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=df,
    family=sm.families.Binomial()
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": df["match_id"]}
)

print(style_glm.summary())

```

```{python}
df = df.dropna(
    subset=[
        "outcome",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

# make sure baseline category is "0"
df["outcome"] = pd.Categorical(
    df["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"],
    ordered=False
)

# statsmodels MNLogit wants numeric codes
df["outcome_code"] = df["outcome"].cat.codes

mnlogit_result = smf.mnlogit(
    """
    outcome_code ~ powerplay
                 + C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                 + C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                 + powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                 + powerplay:C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                 + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=df
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": df["match_id"]},
    maxiter=200
)

print(mnlogit_result.summary())
```

```{python}

for col in ["h_before", "h_after", "powerplay"]:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors="coerce")

df["h_points_scored"] = df["h_after"] - df["h_before"]

risk_obs = (
    df.dropna(subset=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp", "h_points_scored"])
    .groupby(["powerplay", "end_grp", "score_diff_grp"], as_index=False, observed=False)
    .agg(
        n=("h_points_scored", "size"),
        mean_points=("h_points_scored", "mean"),
        sd_points=("h_points_scored", "std"),
        p0=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 0).mean()),
        p1=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 1).mean()),
        p2plus=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s >= 2).mean())
    )
)

print(risk_obs.round(3))
```

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# --- Minimal Style Setup ---
sns.set_theme(style="white")
FIG_WIDTH, FIG_HEIGHT = 10, 6  # slightly larger for poster
DPI = 300
FONT_SCALE = FIG_WIDTH / 8
plt.rcParams.update({
    'figure.dpi': DPI,
    'axes.spines.top': False,
    'axes.spines.right': False,
    'axes.labelsize': 22 * FONT_SCALE,
    'axes.titlesize': 26 * FONT_SCALE,  # not used now
    'xtick.labelsize': 20 * FONT_SCALE,
    'ytick.labelsize': 20 * FONT_SCALE,
    'legend.fontsize': 18 * FONT_SCALE
})

C_STD, C_PP = "#bdc3c7", "#1a2a6c"

def get_pred_grid():
    states = [(pp, sd, eg) for eg in ["<=6", ">=7"] 
              for sd in ["leading", "tied", "trailing"] for pp in [0, 1]]
    return pd.DataFrame(states, columns=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp"]).assign(strength_diff_z=0)


# --- Figure 1 ---
def save_fig1(df):
    pp_used = df[df["powerplay"] == 1]
    usage = pp_used.groupby(["score_diff_grp", "end_grp"], observed=False).size().reset_index(name="count")

    plt.figure(figsize=(FIG_WIDTH, FIG_HEIGHT))
    sns.barplot(
        data=usage, x="score_diff_grp", y="count", hue="end_grp",
        palette=["#3498db", "#2ecc71"], order=["leading", "tied", "trailing"]
    )
    plt.ylabel("Power Play Ends (Count)")
    plt.xlabel("Score State")
    handles, labels = plt.gca().get_legend_handles_labels()
    plt.legend(handles, labels, title="End Group", frameon=False, fontsize=18, title_fontsize=20, loc='upper left')
    plt.tight_layout(pad=2)
    plt.savefig("../poster/Fig1.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.close()


# --- Figure 2 ---
def save_fig2(model):
    grid = get_pred_grid()
    grid["rate"] = model.predict(grid) * 100
    plt.figure(figsize=(FIG_WIDTH, FIG_HEIGHT))
    bar = sns.barplot(
        data=grid, x="score_diff_grp", y="rate", hue="powerplay",
        palette=[C_STD, C_PP], order=["leading", "tied", "trailing"]
    )
    plt.ylabel("Offensive Shots (%)")
    plt.xlabel("Score State")
    handles, labels = bar.get_legend_handles_labels()
    plt.legend(handles, ["No Power Play", "Power Play"], title="Power Play", fontsize=18, title_fontsize=20, loc='lower right')
    plt.tight_layout(pad=2)
    plt.savefig("../poster/Fig2.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.close()


# --- Figure 3 ---
def save_fig3(model):
    grid = get_pred_grid()
    probs = model.predict(grid)
    probs.columns = ["0", "1", "2+"]
    df_res = pd.concat([grid, probs], axis=1)
    diff = (df_res[df_res.powerplay==1].set_index(["end_grp", "score_diff_grp"])[["0","1","2+"]] - 
            df_res[df_res.powerplay==0].set_index(["end_grp", "score_diff_grp"])[["0","1","2+"]]) * 100
    vmax = np.max(np.abs(diff.values))

    plt.figure(figsize=(FIG_WIDTH, FIG_HEIGHT+1))
    ax = sns.heatmap(
        diff.reindex(["leading", "tied", "trailing"], level=1),
        annot=True, fmt="+.1f", 
        annot_kws={"size": 26},  # <-- increase number size here
        cmap="RdBu_r", center=0, vmin=-vmax, vmax=vmax,
        cbar_kws={'label': 'Δ Probability (%)', 'shrink': 1.0}
    )
    cbar = ax.collections[0].colorbar
    cbar.ax.tick_params(labelsize=20)
    cbar.ax.yaxis.label.set_size(24)
    plt.xlabel("Points Scored")
    plt.ylabel("End | Score State")
    plt.tight_layout(pad=2)
    plt.savefig("../poster/Fig3.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.close()


# --- Figure 4 ---
def save_fig4(df):
    var_table = (
        df.dropna(subset=["h_points_scored","score_diff_grp","end_grp","powerplay"])
          .groupby(["end_grp","score_diff_grp","powerplay"], observed=False)
          .agg(sd_points=("h_points_scored","std"))
          .reset_index()
    )
    pivot_no = var_table[var_table.powerplay==0].pivot(index="end_grp", columns="score_diff_grp", values="sd_points")
    pivot_pp = var_table[var_table.powerplay==1].pivot(index="end_grp", columns="score_diff_grp", values="sd_points")
    pivot_diff = pivot_pp - pivot_no
    vmax = np.max(np.abs(pivot_diff.values))

    plt.figure(figsize=(FIG_WIDTH, FIG_HEIGHT))
    ax = sns.heatmap(
        pivot_diff, annot=True, fmt=".2f",
        annot_kws={"size": 26},  # <-- increase number size here
        cmap="RdBu_r", center=0, vmin=-vmax, vmax=vmax,
        cbar_kws={'label': 'Δ SD Points', 'shrink': 1.0}
    )
    cbar = ax.collections[0].colorbar
    cbar.ax.tick_params(labelsize=20)
    cbar.ax.yaxis.label.set_size(24)
    plt.ylabel("End Group")
    plt.xlabel("Score State")
    plt.tight_layout(pad=2)
    plt.savefig("../poster/Fig4.pdf", bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.close()


# --- Run all figures ---
save_fig1(df)
save_fig2(style_glm)
save_fig3(mnlogit_result)
save_fig4(df)
print("Files saved successfully: Fig1.pdf, Fig2.pdf, Fig3.pdf, Fig4.pdf")
```



```{python}

```
